meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and overcome a lack of portfolio. A beginner-level checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a business death sentence for founders. You solve this by deploying an Antigravity project template—a high-fidelity, production-ready MVP foundation. By leveraging Claude Code, you transform theoretical ideas into live, revenue-generating SaaS assets, proving your technical competence to investors and paying customers instantly.
content.intro:
The silence of a blank GitHub profile is deafening. As a founder, your inability to demonstrate a shipped product keeps you in the purgatory of 'idea-stage' while your competitors capture market share. You aren't just missing a portfolio; you are missing the trust signal required to close your first ten customers.

But the era of spending months on boilerplate is over. By utilizing an Antigravity project template, you collapse the distance between concept and deployment. We are going to bypass the tedious setup, leverage the raw power of Claude Code, and build a portfolio-worthy asset that screams authority and technical execution.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Initialize your project with a production-grade structure that includes authentication, database, and billing hooks out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project template with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration. Focus on a clean, modular architecture.

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition
steps.description: Configure the core business logic. Your portfolio needs to showcase a product that solves a specific, painful problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a landing page and dashboard structure for a B2B SaaS tool that automates invoice processing. Use Tailwind CSS for a professional look.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate landing page components for invoice automation'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Data Schemas
steps.description: Configure your database layer to handle real-world user data. This demonstrates your ability to manage complex state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for managing user profiles, subscription tiers, and invoice history using Supabase/PostgreSQL.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply database schema updates for subscription management'

steps.title: Integrate High-Value Features
steps.description: Add one 'killer' feature that differentiates your project from generic tutorials, such as an AI-powered data export or custom reporting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a feature that allows users to export invoice data into a formatted PDF using a serverless function.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create pdf export serverless function'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: A portfolio piece is only real if it is live. Deploy your project to a public URL to establish your technical authority.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure build settings for Vercel deployment and optimize the project for performance.

pro_tips: Focus on 'shipping' over 'coding'; investors care about the live URL, not your lines of code.
Use the Antigravity template's built-in billing hooks to show you understand SaaS revenue fundamentals.
Keep your UI 'boring' and professional; flashy designs often hide a lack of core functionality.
Treat your GitHub README like a sales landing page; explain the 'Why' behind the project, not just the 'How'.
Integrate one real-world API to prove you can handle third-party integrations, which is a major pain point for enterprises.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, add a 'Case Study' section to your personal website linking to this live project, then begin cold-emailing potential users to test the market.
content.conversion_block: Stop hiding behind a blank screen. Your market-ready product is just a few prompts away from reality. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
